Advanced Momentum Analyzer

OBV + Sortino + Slope Acceleration | 1401 assets | 2026-03-06  |  market-dashboards
Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-06 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Analyzes 700+ assets using OBV divergence detection, Sortino ratios, slope acceleration, and trajectory classification. Produces signals from STRONG_BUY to SELL with confidence scores. OBV divergence flags price-volume disagreements as early warning signals.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum dashboard shows a heavily bearish market with 468 sell signals dominating the output, while only 36 buy signals and 260 strong buys suggest weakness in upward momentum across the 700+ analyzed assets. The top buy candidates cluster almost exclusively in V-shaped recovery trajectories with high 90% confidence scores, including ACMR, AFK, AEIS, AEM, AG, AEP, AIA, and AIRR, indicating the algorithm has identified a concentrated group of assets bouncing from lows. The stark contrast between 468 sell signals and just 296 combined buy/strong buy signals (36 + 260) reflects an extremely imbalanced market where the majority of assets lack bullish conviction. The uniform V-shaped pattern and identical 90% confidence levels across most strong buys suggests either a coordinated sector recovery or a market-wide technical rebound rather than idiosyncratic strength. This distribution pattern warrants attention to potential OBV divergences on the sell-heavy side, as the prevalence of sell signals combined with pockets of strong recoveries could signal disagreement between price action and volume confirmation.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
MODERATE MOMENTUM
